name: fixmap-workspace
description: Local-first repo context for coding agents: paste a GitHub issue URL to get ranked files, test routes, and risks.

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:cli && npm run build:action && npm run build:web
scripts.build:action: npm run build:core && esbuild packages/action/src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=esm --outfile=packages/action/dist/index.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire as __fixmapCreateRequire } from 'module'; const require = __fixmapCreateRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.check:action-bundle: npm run build:action && git diff --exit-code packages/action/dist/index.mjs
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run check:action-metadata && npm run check:server-manifest && npm run check:action-bundle && npm run smoke && npm run evaluate && npm run benchmark:check
scripts.smoke: node packages/cli/dist/cli.js plan --issue "password reset fails" --repo examples/tiny-auth-app --format json --output fixmap-report.json && node scripts/smoke-action.mjs && node scripts/smoke-workspace.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:core && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
